name: Garen Ironfoot
backstory: I've been a merchant for 40 years, traveling the trade routes between Ironhaven and the Eastern Kingdoms. I started as a boy helping my father sell grain at the village market. At 18, I joined a merchant caravan and learned the art of negotiation from Master Thaddeus, a legendary trader. I survived the Great Bandit War of '95 when our convoy was ambushed near Redstone Pass - I still have the scar on my left arm. I built my fortune trading rare spices from the Southern Isles, exotic fabrics from Silvermoor, and enchanted trinkets from the Mage's Quarter. I've dealt with kings, thieves, and everything in between. I opened my first permanent shop in Ironhaven 20 years ago and now employ 12 apprentices. I know the value of every coin and every item. My wife Elara runs our textile business while I handle the exotic goods. I've been to 47 cities across 8 kingdoms. My reputation for fair deals has earned me guild master status in the Merchant's Alliance.

additional_context.notable_event: Survived Great Bandit War of '95 at Redstone Pass
additional_context.reputation: Known for fair deals and accurate appraisals
additional_context.favorite_saying: Every coin tells a story, friend
